## What I am

A fixed fixture SOUL.md used only by tests/unit/hook-cache-prefix.bats to
prove loa-l7-surface-soul.sh is byte-deterministic across two runs.

## What I am not

Not the real project SOUL.md — never loaded outside this test.

## Voice

Flat, fixed, unchanging.

## Discipline

Byte-for-byte identical on every run given identical inputs.

## Influences

tests/integration/soul-identity-7b.bats fixture pattern.
